data.body:
APPLY COMPLETE + HEALTH VERIFIED (operator-attested evidence). `terraform apply` succeeded; final `terraform plan` = **'No changes. Your infrastructure matches the configuration.'** All 17 resources adopted into rebar state (rebar-tfstate-896586841071), retagged Project=rebar. Pre-existing /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key drift also resolved (it existed in AWS but not state — imported + tagged). Post-migration health check:
- GET https://auth.solutions.navateam.com/authorize?return_to=https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com -> HTTP 302 to accounts.google.com with client_id 114566571260-... , hd=navapbc.com, and a valid signed state (proves imported origin-secret handshake + preserved cookie-signing secret both work).
- Direct execute-api hit (bypassing CloudFront) -> HTTP 403 (origin-secret guard intact).
- https://auth.solutions.navateam.com/_logout -> HTTP 200 over wildcard-cert TLS.
Next: terraform state rm from snap's shared state (single-owner).
